name: 7-day omnivore protocol meal plan

meals.name: Salmon Eggs Benedict with Avocado Hollandaise
meals.recipe:
For the Hollandaise: In a blender combine ½ a ripe avocado and 2 pinches of salt and pepper with 2 tsps of lemon juice and 1/3 cup of water. Blend until smooth (approximately a minute and a half). While still blending, add 1 tablespoons of olive oil and continue to blend until combined. Set aside.
Then, In the small saucepan add a ½ tbsp of olive oil and a handful of spinach, salt, and pepper. Flip the spinach a couple of times so that is coated in the olive oil and cook down until the spinach is wilted. Remove from heat for later use.
In a small non-stick pan heat Trifecta salmon over low heat. When salmon is warm to the touch turn up heat to medium to lightly brown and crisp up the salmon filet.
While heating the salmon, toast the English muffin and eggs.
To plate, place a portion of the wilted spinach on the English muffin and layer the browned salmon and poached egg. Top with the avocado hollandaise and some red pepper flakes.

meals.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

meals.name: The Bounce-Back Protein Smoothie Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Mix for 30 seconds

meals.name: Beef Chop Suey Recipe
meals.recipe:
In a large nonstick frying pan add olive oil and beef, cook until brown. Do not overcook or beef goes tough
In a second pan, add olive oil, cabbage, celery, mushrooms, water chestnuts, soybean, vinegar and onion
Cook until entire mixture is hot and onions have softened
Add soy sauce, beef stock and cooked beef
Cook this mixture for 5-10 minutes

meals.name: Coconut Cashew Keto Fried Chicken Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add the cashews into a food processor and pulse until coarse dust is formed. Add the coconut flakes, garlic, salt, paprika, and parsley. Pulse once again to combine. Transfer to a medium bowl.
In a separate bowl mix the egg, coconut milk, and water mixture. Mix together by whipping with a fork or with a hand blender until fully incorporated. Add a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Coat chicken by soaking first in the egg-coconut milk mixture. Dip chicken in the egg mixture followed then by cashew mixture, fully coating both sides of each piece and shaking off any excess. Transfer to a holding plate until all chicken pieces are fully coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, and add the coconut and avocado oil and allow to heat for 1-2 minutes. Carefully add the breaded chicken to the skillet using tongs by placing the chicken away from you to avoid hot oil from splashing and burning you. Cook until browned on each side and warmed through (about 3-4 minutes per side).

meals.name: Healthy Chili Recipe
ingredients: 2 lbs lean ground beef (80%) or turkey
meals.recipe:
Brown ground beef or turkey
Place meat in soup kettle with all ingredients
Season with salt and pepper
Optional additions: diced jalapenos, green chilies, ranch dressing seasoning packet, or salsa
If chili is too thick, add water as needed
Cook until thoroughly heated

meals.name: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad
meals.recipe:
Add cauliflower florets to a large pot and cover with water
Bring to a boil and boil 7-8 minutes until fork tender
Drain cauliflower and set aside
In a bowl combine Greek yogurt, ranch seasoning and salt and pepper
Gently mix yogurt into cauliflower until coated
Mix in shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon
Finish with chives if desired
Serve right away or refrigerate until ready to use

meals.name: Summer BBQ Pulled Pork & Coleslaw Sandwiches Recipe
meals.recipe:
Cook pork with BBQ sauce until tender.
Combine coleslaw, greek yogurt, mustard, salt & pepper.
Divide pork among 4 rolls.
Top with coleslaw and serve warm.

meals.name: Joe Ohrablo's Protein Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 20 grams of carbs from fruit (banana, blueberries or strawberries)
meals.recipe:
Mix all ingredients into a pancake batter, adding a tiny bit of water to make it easy to mix
Spray nonstick pan with cooking spray
Cook until brown on each side
Throw on cinnamon for extra taste
Top with sugar free syrup if desired

meals.name: Trifecta Five Minute Burger Recipe
ingredients: 4 hamburger buns, whole wheat or whole grain, toasted
2 tablespoons chipotle mayo or favorite condiment
½ cup arugula or any other bitter leafy green
½ cup Trifecta portobello mushroom, warmed
1 cup favorite Trifecta veggies, as a side
meals.recipe:
Begin by toasting buns in a toaster or toaster oven until golden brown.
Microwave Trifecta patties for 2 minutes to reheat, by making a small hole in a corner to allow steam to escape. Carefully remove plastic film and keep warm until needed. Spread the chipotle mayo on both burger buns. On the bottom bun, add a small ⅛ packed cup of arugula.
Slice tomatoes. Slice the avocados lengthwise and separate them into quarters. Fan avocado and place on top of the leafy greens. Carefully transfer the patties from the microwave to the bottom burger bun. Place 3 thin tomato slices or 2 thick slices on top of each patty. Top with ⅛ cup warm mushrooms and place the top bun on the burger.
Optional side: Reheat 1 cup of your favorite Trifecta vegetable and enjoy your 5-minute dinner!

meals.name: Healthy High Protein Cinnamon Coffee Cake Recipe
ingredients: 1 scoop Muscle Gauge Nutrition Cinnamon Whey Isolate
meals.recipe: Preheat oven to 350 F. Blend all ingredients together. Pour into 2 greased ramekins. Sprinkle cinnamon on top. Bake for 20-25 minutes.

meals.name: Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe
ingredients: Fresh cilantro stems and or cheese of choice
meals.recipe:
Dice the chicken into even small squares, bite-size. Keep in a bowl. Chop the lettuce and keep separated. Make sure you clean your cutting board between tasks to avoid cross-contamination of flavors.
Mix the marinade ingredients in a bowl and whisk to incorporate. A paste should form. Toss the diced chicken into the bowl and coat uniformly.
Spray a non-stick pan with spray oil and heat over medium heat. Once the pan is beginning to slightly smoke, add the chicken and heat up 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly. Keep warm.
Meanwhile, reheat your rice in two separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave.
In a plate or bowl, plate ⅓ cup of white rice next to ⅓ cup of brown rice. Weight 4.5 ounces of chicken per bowl, ¼ cup of pico de gallo, ¼ cup of romaine, ¼ fanned avocado, and 2 teaspoons of greek yogurt on top. Pick washed fresh cilantro and garnish.

meals.name: Vegan Mediterranean Beyond Breakfast Skillet Recipe
ingredients: 4 Trifecta A La Carte Beyond Beef® patties or 1 (16 oz) package Beyond Beef®
1 can artichoke hearts, drained and sliced
½ cup sweet potato, small diced
meals.recipe:
Heat a medium cast-iron pan or skillet over medium heat.
Add chickpeas, sweet potato, garlic, and onion; sauté for 5 minutes, stirring often.
Deglaze the pan with lemon juice then crumble in the Beyond Meat®.
Cook for 5 minutes until lightly browned then mix in the coriander, nutritional yeast, artichoke hearts, and tomatoes. Sauté on medium-high heat for 5 more minutes. Then turn off the heat.
Mix in the olives and fresh herbs then dig in!

meals.name: Bodybuilders' Steak & Grilled Cheese Sandwich Recipe
ingredients: 2 slices reduced fat pepper jack cheese
8 oz thinly sliced sirloin tip steak
meals.recipe:
Season meat and cook as desired
Add peppers and onions to medium skillet and cook until tender
Layer steak, veggies and cheese onto bread
Top with additional bread slice
Heat medium skillet or grill pan over medium heat
Add sandwich to pan and toast until golden
Flip and toast until cheese is fully melted

meals.name: High Protein Strawberry Shortcake Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Spray 4 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Whisk together dry ingredients: oat flour, protein powder and baking soda
Add in egg whites and sweetener if using
Allow batter to sit for 5 minutes
Evenly divide batter between 4 muffin cups
Bake for about 7 minutes
While shortcakes are baking, dice strawberries
When shortcakes are done, allow to cool 5 minutes
Using a knife, cut the top off the muffin and scoop out a bit of the middle to create a cup shape
Fill cake with Greek yogurt and top with strawberries and whipped cream if desired

meals.name: Easy Paleo Chili Beef Recipe
ingredients: 2 cups diced tomato, canned, juice drained and ¼ cup reserved.
meals.recipe:
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Combine all the seasoning spice mix ingredients in a separate bowl, with the exception of salt.
Dice the onion and keep in a bowl. Heat oil over medium-high in a pot large enough to hold all ingredients. Once the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking, add the onions, mix constantly to prevent onions from burning. Reduce heat to medium and cook onions for 3-5 minutes or until they start to develop a caramelized color. Use your best judgment on the timing. Once some caramelization begins to happen, add bell peppers and garlic and mix to cook for 2 minutes, avoiding the garlic from burnin...
Add the spice mix to the pot and mix to fully coat all the vegetables. The point of this step is to bring the fragrant tones of the spices up. After a few seconds, add canned tomatoes by crushing them with your hand as you add them to the pot, or by crushing them with a wooden or metal spoon in the pot. Mix and scrape any brown bits from the pan. Add ¼ cup of tomato juice, plus water or stock and increase the heat to bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-high and maintain an ag...
Immediately add the ground beef along with honey, and mix to incorporate. Bring the pot back up to an aggressive simmer, mixing constantly, for about 3 minutes or until beef is heated through. Add extra water or stock if the sauce is becoming too thick.
Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Use your best judgment in the heat adjustment.
Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).
Garnish each bowl with your preferred condiments or garnishes (chives, cheese, tortilla strips, and even fried shallots are some of my favorites).

meals.name: Protein Pumpkin Pancakes With Oats Recipe
ingredients: Topping: 2 tsp peanut flour mixed with water until syrupy
meals.recipe:
Blend the eggs, protein powder, oats and pumpkin together until smooth
Cook like pancakes on a nonstick griddle over medium heat
Flip when bubbles form on surface
Mix peanut flour with water to make syrupy topping
Serve topped with peanut flour syrup

meals.name: Low-Fat, High-Protein Vegetarian BBQ Cobb Salad Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup low-sodium black beans, drained and rinsed
meals.recipe:
Cook TVP according to package directions
Mix TVP with BBQ sauce
Add lettuce and veggies to salad bowl
Top with TVP and BBQ mixture
Top with salad dressing of choice or additional BBQ sauce

meals.name: Game Day Buffalo Chicken Sliders Recipe
ingredients: 2 lbs boneless skinless chicken breast, cooked and shredded
1/4 cup reduced fat blue cheese dressing
meals.recipe:
Combine shredded chicken, wing sauce and ranch seasoning in mixing bowl and toss until coated
Place a small lettuce leaf on each roll
Top with shredded buffalo chicken
Finish off with a drizzle of blue cheese dressing

meals.name: Protein-Packed Smoky Bison Chili Recipe
ingredients: 1 lb ground bison (can sub ground beef or turkey)
1 can kidney beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 to 0.75 cup water or beef broth
meals.recipe:
Coat bottom of large pot with oil or nonstick spray
Saute chopped onion, garlic, and bacon for 2 minutes until onion becomes slightly translucent
Add in bison and cook 3-4 minutes
Add in fire roasted tomatoes, tomato sauce and all seasonings
Simmer 2-3 minutes
Stir in unflavored protein powder
Mix in kidney beans
Add water or broth until desired thickness
Add in liquid smoke
Allow to simmer 30 minutes
Serve topped with Greek yogurt, shredded cheddar and fresh chives

meals.name: Low Carb, High Protein Breakfast Pizza Eggs Recipe
ingredients: Pizza seasoning or Italian Herbs to taste
meals.recipe:
Coat a 9 inch skillet with nonstick spray
Whisk together egg, egg whites, zucchini, coconut flour and pizza seasoning
Pour mixture into pan and set over medium heat
Cover pan and cook until eggs are set and edges become slightly golden
Top with pasta sauce and grated cheese

meals.name: Fast Chicken Shawarma with Sweet Potato Recipe
ingredients: Garnish, optional: Greek-lemon yogurt and chopped fresh parsley
½ teaspoon of the following: ground garlic, ground cumin, ground caraway, ground cardamom, ground ginger, paprika, ground cinnamon, and black pepper
meals.recipe:
Mix the Shawarma wet rub ingredients in a bowl. The consistency should be a paste
Dice the chicken into bite-size squares, as even as possible. Add diced chicken into the bowl with the spice paste. Mix to coat evenly.
Heat up a non-stick pan over medium heat, and spray to coat with spray oil. Add the chicken and heat for 2-3 minutes. Taste to make sure chicken is heated through. Turn off heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm-up both sweet potato mash and broccoli in separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave. Add 30 seconds if broccoli and sweet potato are not heated through. Keep warm until needed.
Plate ½ cup of sweet potato, along with ½ cup of broccoli and 4 ounces of the chicken Shawarma. Garnish with greek-lemon yogurt and parsley if desired.

meals.name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Bark Recipe
ingredients: 1 scoop peanut butter marshmallow protein powder
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients except chocolate peanut butter to a blender.
Mix well.
Spread on parchment paper.
Drizzle peanut butter on top.
Freeze overnight.
Break into pieces.

meals.name: Fall Pomegranate Chicken Salad Recipe
ingredients: 16 ounces Trifecta chicken breast, diced into squares evenly
4 tablespoons pomegranate seeds, store-bought to save time
¼ cup Trifecta almonds, favorite kind
4 tablespoon Mustard Honey Vin, store-bought or home-made
meals.recipe:
Prepare all ingredients as indicated. In a big bowl, mix all greens together. Season with a sprinkle of kosher salt.
Portion 0.5 cup of green mix in each plate, ⅓ cup of quinoa, 4 ounces of diced chicken, sprinkle 1 tablespoon of pom seeds, followed by 1 tablespoon of almonds, and 1 tablespoon of crumbled feta cheese in the middle of the salad.
Dress the salad with 1 tablespoon of mustard honey vin. Taste for seasoning and add another sprinkle of salt to the salad to bring up the flavor of all the ingredients. Enjoy!
Conversely, feel free to mix each salad in a bowl following the same serving sizes.

meals.name: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Pour mixture into a waffle maker, heat and serve

meals.name: Easy Beefy Flatbread Recipe
ingredients: ½ cup store-bought slaw mix or thinly sliced cabbage (use a mandolin)
meals.recipe:
Preheat toaster oven or larger oven to 350F. Slightly toast the flatbreads to help them keep their bodies and avoid becoming soggy while constructing them. Spray a sheet tray with oil and spread all four flatbreads on the tray, making sure they are not overlapping each other. Toast for 3 minutes, keeping an eye on the flatbreads. Remove from the oven carefully. Keep oven on.
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Spread 1 tablespoon of pesto on top of each flatbread.
Divide ¼ cup of arugula and ¼ cup of Trifecta mushrooms on top of each flatbread, sprinkling around.
Similarly, sprinkle 4 ounces of the crumbled beef on each flatbread. Finish by dividing the 1 ounce of crumbled gorgonzola cheese evenly into all 4 flatbreads (¼ ounce on each).
Return built flatbreads to the sheet tray used to toast the flatbreads, and bake in the oven for 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted. Cut into quarters and enjoy!

meals.name: Healthy High Protein Jumbo Apple Muffin Recipe
ingredients: Liquid Egg Whites (enough to make a thin batter, about 0.5-0.75 cup)
meals.recipe:
Mix everything except apple in microwave safe bowl
Let stand for a couple minutes so coconut flour absorbs moisture
Stir then add the apple
Stir again and microwave for 8-9 minutes

meals.name: Sega Wat (Spicy Ethiopian Beef Stew)
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 cups chunky pureed onions (pulse in food processor to form a chunky paste)
4 hard-boiled eggs, shelled and pierced all over with a fork 1/4 inch deep
meals.recipe:
Heat 3 tablespoons of niter kibbeh or butter in a heavy pot or Dutch oven. Add the onions and cook, covered, over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon niter kibbeh and continue to cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of niter kibbeh and cook, covered, over low heat for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the beef, broth, salt and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low...
Adjust the seasonings, adding more berbere according to taste and heat preference. Add the hard-boiled eggs and simmer on low heat, covered, for another 10 to heat through. Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with Ethiopian injera, bread or rice.*This stew is even better the next day after the flavors have had more time to meld.

target_macros.rationale: Protein: 2.5 g/kg lean mass (cutting, BF% known, omnivore). Fat: ~20% of calories (diet-mode aware; no somatotype tweak). Carbs: remainder of calorie budget unless constrained by diet mode (omnivore).

water_guidance: Aim to be peeing clear by noon.
Have five clear urinations a day.
Don't be dehydrated at the time of your workouts.
Taper water toward the end of the day so you don't wake to pee.

protocol_notes: Calories are matched by portion scaling at the day level.
Protein is scored during meal selection, but add a lean protein side if a day falls short.
Diet/allergen filters are hard constraints; cuisine preference is a soft adherence preference.
Use weekly average adherence, weight, and measurements before changing calories.
Fruit/veg target: 2 cups fruit and 2 cups vegetables daily; fibre target ~22 g/day.

alternatives.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

alternatives.recipe:

Steam or microwave asparagus tips until just tender
Halve tomatoes, squeeze out pips then chop roughly
Arrange beans on serving plates with tomato, asparagus, and onion

Mix together oil, lemon juice, most of oregano and seasoning
Pour most of dressing over salad, slice tuna and add
Drizzle remaining dressing and garnish with rest of oregano

alternatives.recipe:

alternatives.name: Fast Chicken Shawarma with Sweet Potato Recipe
ingredients: Garnish, optional: Greek-lemon yogurt and chopped fresh parsley
½ teaspoon of the following: ground garlic, ground cumin, ground caraway, ground cardamom, ground ginger, paprika, ground cinnamon, and black pepper
alternatives.recipe:
Mix the Shawarma wet rub ingredients in a bowl. The consistency should be a paste
Dice the chicken into bite-size squares, as even as possible. Add diced chicken into the bowl with the spice paste. Mix to coat evenly.
Heat up a non-stick pan over medium heat, and spray to coat with spray oil. Add the chicken and heat for 2-3 minutes. Taste to make sure chicken is heated through. Turn off heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm-up both sweet potato mash and broccoli in separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave. Add 30 seconds if broccoli and sweet potato are not heated through. Keep warm until needed.
Plate ½ cup of sweet potato, along with ½ cup of broccoli and 4 ounces of the chicken Shawarma. Garnish with greek-lemon yogurt and parsley if desired.

alternatives.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

alternatives.name: Fall Chicken and Rice Soup Recipe
ingredients: 8 cups water or stock, chicken and vegetable/mushroom base, split
To taste, Salt and Black Pepper
alternatives.recipe:
Prepare the chicken by dicing the chicken, or using the Trifecta pulled chicken, if preferred. Keep in a bowl until needed. Separately, prepare all vegetables as indicated. For the carrots, peel 2-3 depending on the size, cut the ends and discard, slice in half, and cut across evenly about 1” size half-moons. After washing, cut the celery across in an equivalent size to the carrots, discarding the tops and bottoms. Dice the onions on a medium size and mix with celery and carrots. This is call...
In a pan deep enough to hold all ingredients plus stock, heat up the grapeseed oil over medium-high heat, until the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking. Immediately add the mirepoix (onion, celery, carrot mix) and increase heat to high. Stir often avoiding the onions from burning, and adjust heat as needed, reducing if the vegetables begin to charr too much.
Cook mirepoix for 3-5 minutes, again - adjusting the heat as needed - or until the vegetables begin to become translucent. Add the diced chicken, along with the tomato paste. Mix to coat all ingredients in the pot with it. The tomato paste should cook and become fragrant for a few minutes. Before the paste begins to burn, add the stocks to the pan to deglaze and mix scraping any brown bits (this is flavor so make sure you do this with a wooden spoon ideally).
Bring the mix to a boil. Once boiling, add broccoli and rice. Simmer for another 3 minutes or until all vegetables are heated through. Serve immediately dividing all soup guts amongst 4 bowls, and then topping off with any extra stock.
If not eating immediately, cool the soup immediately by placing a large Ziploc bag filled with ice inside the pot, stirring occasionally. Once cooled down to 40F or below, store in an air-tight container.

alternatives.name: Salmon Eggs Benedict with Avocado Hollandaise
alternatives.recipe:
For the Hollandaise: In a blender combine ½ a ripe avocado and 2 pinches of salt and pepper with 2 tsps of lemon juice and 1/3 cup of water. Blend until smooth (approximately a minute and a half). While still blending, add 1 tablespoons of olive oil and continue to blend until combined. Set aside.
Then, In the small saucepan add a ½ tbsp of olive oil and a handful of spinach, salt, and pepper. Flip the spinach a couple of times so that is coated in the olive oil and cook down until the spinach is wilted. Remove from heat for later use.
In a small non-stick pan heat Trifecta salmon over low heat. When salmon is warm to the touch turn up heat to medium to lightly brown and crisp up the salmon filet.
While heating the salmon, toast the English muffin and eggs.
To plate, place a portion of the wilted spinach on the English muffin and layer the browned salmon and poached egg. Top with the avocado hollandaise and some red pepper flakes.

alternatives.name: Coconut Cashew Keto Fried Chicken Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add the cashews into a food processor and pulse until coarse dust is formed. Add the coconut flakes, garlic, salt, paprika, and parsley. Pulse once again to combine. Transfer to a medium bowl.
In a separate bowl mix the egg, coconut milk, and water mixture. Mix together by whipping with a fork or with a hand blender until fully incorporated. Add a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Coat chicken by soaking first in the egg-coconut milk mixture. Dip chicken in the egg mixture followed then by cashew mixture, fully coating both sides of each piece and shaking off any excess. Transfer to a holding plate until all chicken pieces are fully coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, and add the coconut and avocado oil and allow to heat for 1-2 minutes. Carefully add the breaded chicken to the skillet using tongs by placing the chicken away from you to avoid hot oil from splashing and burning you. Cook until browned on each side and warmed through (about 3-4 minutes per side).

alternatives.name: Vegan Mediterranean Beyond Breakfast Skillet Recipe
ingredients: 4 Trifecta A La Carte Beyond Beef® patties or 1 (16 oz) package Beyond Beef®
1 can artichoke hearts, drained and sliced
½ cup sweet potato, small diced
alternatives.recipe:
Heat a medium cast-iron pan or skillet over medium heat.
Add chickpeas, sweet potato, garlic, and onion; sauté for 5 minutes, stirring often.
Deglaze the pan with lemon juice then crumble in the Beyond Meat®.
Cook for 5 minutes until lightly browned then mix in the coriander, nutritional yeast, artichoke hearts, and tomatoes. Sauté on medium-high heat for 5 more minutes. Then turn off the heat.
Mix in the olives and fresh herbs then dig in!

alternatives.name: Easy Paleo Chili Beef Recipe
ingredients: 2 cups diced tomato, canned, juice drained and ¼ cup reserved.
alternatives.recipe:
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Combine all the seasoning spice mix ingredients in a separate bowl, with the exception of salt.
Dice the onion and keep in a bowl. Heat oil over medium-high in a pot large enough to hold all ingredients. Once the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking, add the onions, mix constantly to prevent onions from burning. Reduce heat to medium and cook onions for 3-5 minutes or until they start to develop a caramelized color. Use your best judgment on the timing. Once some caramelization begins to happen, add bell peppers and garlic and mix to cook for 2 minutes, avoiding the garlic from burnin...
Add the spice mix to the pot and mix to fully coat all the vegetables. The point of this step is to bring the fragrant tones of the spices up. After a few seconds, add canned tomatoes by crushing them with your hand as you add them to the pot, or by crushing them with a wooden or metal spoon in the pot. Mix and scrape any brown bits from the pan. Add ¼ cup of tomato juice, plus water or stock and increase the heat to bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-high and maintain an ag...
Immediately add the ground beef along with honey, and mix to incorporate. Bring the pot back up to an aggressive simmer, mixing constantly, for about 3 minutes or until beef is heated through. Add extra water or stock if the sauce is becoming too thick.
Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Use your best judgment in the heat adjustment.
Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).
Garnish each bowl with your preferred condiments or garnishes (chives, cheese, tortilla strips, and even fried shallots are some of my favorites).

Cook until entire mixture is hot and onions have softened
Add soy sauce, beef stock and cooked beef
Cook this mixture for 5-10 minutes

alternatives.name: Protein-Packed Smoky Bison Chili Recipe
ingredients: 1 lb ground bison (can sub ground beef or turkey)
1 can kidney beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 to 0.75 cup water or beef broth
alternatives.recipe:
Coat bottom of large pot with oil or nonstick spray
Saute chopped onion, garlic, and bacon for 2 minutes until onion becomes slightly translucent
Add in bison and cook 3-4 minutes
Add in fire roasted tomatoes, tomato sauce and all seasonings
Simmer 2-3 minutes
Stir in unflavored protein powder
Mix in kidney beans
Add water or broth until desired thickness
Add in liquid smoke
Allow to simmer 30 minutes
Serve topped with Greek yogurt, shredded cheddar and fresh chives

ingredients: Fresh cilantro stems and or cheese of choice
alternatives.recipe:
Dice the chicken into even small squares, bite-size. Keep in a bowl. Chop the lettuce and keep separated. Make sure you clean your cutting board between tasks to avoid cross-contamination of flavors.
Mix the marinade ingredients in a bowl and whisk to incorporate. A paste should form. Toss the diced chicken into the bowl and coat uniformly.
Spray a non-stick pan with spray oil and heat over medium heat. Once the pan is beginning to slightly smoke, add the chicken and heat up 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly. Keep warm.
Meanwhile, reheat your rice in two separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave.
In a plate or bowl, plate ⅓ cup of white rice next to ⅓ cup of brown rice. Weight 4.5 ounces of chicken per bowl, ¼ cup of pico de gallo, ¼ cup of romaine, ¼ fanned avocado, and 2 teaspoons of greek yogurt on top. Pick washed fresh cilantro and garnish.

alternatives.recipe:

Spray nonstick pan with cooking spray
Cook until brown on each side
Throw on cinnamon for extra taste
Top with sugar free syrup if desired

Cook pork with BBQ sauce until tender.
Combine coleslaw, greek yogurt, mustard, salt & pepper.
Divide pork among 4 rolls.
Top with coleslaw and serve warm.

alternatives.recipe:
Cook TVP according to package directions
Mix TVP with BBQ sauce
Add lettuce and veggies to salad bowl
Top with TVP and BBQ mixture

alternatives.name: New-England Style Shrimp Rolls
ingredients: 1 Tsp of Paprika (can use more to top)
alternatives.recipe:
First, heat the Trifecta shrimp up in the microwave for 2-3 minutes or until warm.
Then spray the potato bun with the butter and toast.
On a cutting board, dice up the celery and cut the green onions.
In a bowl, cut up the shrimp as best as you can into smaller pieces. Then add all the ingredients (except the green onions) and mix together. Include a dash of salt and pepper.
Fill the potato bun with the shrimp mixture. Lightly top with paprika and green onions. Enjoy!

alternatives.name: High Protein Strawberry Shortcake Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Spray 4 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Whisk together dry ingredients: oat flour, protein powder and baking soda
Add in egg whites and sweetener if using
Allow batter to sit for 5 minutes
Evenly divide batter between 4 muffin cups
Bake for about 7 minutes
While shortcakes are baking, dice strawberries
When shortcakes are done, allow to cool 5 minutes
Using a knife, cut the top off the muffin and scoop out a bit of the middle to create a cup shape
Fill cake with Greek yogurt and top with strawberries and whipped cream if desired

alternatives.name: Protein Packed Chocolate Ice Cream Sandwiches Recipe

alternatives.recipe:
Mix together greek yogurt and protein powder.
Break graham crackers in half.
Spread greek yogurt mixture evenly between 6 half sheets.
Top with other half of graham cracker.
Place in freezer for a minimum of 2 hours.

alternatives.name: Healthy High Protein Cinnamon Coffee Cake Recipe

alternatives.recipe: Preheat oven to 350 F. Blend all ingredients together. Pour into 2 greased ramekins. Sprinkle cinnamon on top. Bake for 20-25 minutes.

alternatives.name: Easy Paleo Chili Beef Recipe
ingredients: 2 cups diced tomato, canned, juice drained and ¼ cup reserved.
alternatives.recipe:
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Combine all the seasoning spice mix ingredients in a separate bowl, with the exception of salt.
Dice the onion and keep in a bowl. Heat oil over medium-high in a pot large enough to hold all ingredients. Once the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking, add the onions, mix constantly to prevent onions from burning. Reduce heat to medium and cook onions for 3-5 minutes or until they start to develop a caramelized color. Use your best judgment on the timing. Once some caramelization begins to happen, add bell peppers and garlic and mix to cook for 2 minutes, avoiding the garlic from burnin...
Add the spice mix to the pot and mix to fully coat all the vegetables. The point of this step is to bring the fragrant tones of the spices up. After a few seconds, add canned tomatoes by crushing them with your hand as you add them to the pot, or by crushing them with a wooden or metal spoon in the pot. Mix and scrape any brown bits from the pan. Add ¼ cup of tomato juice, plus water or stock and increase the heat to bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-high and maintain an ag...
Immediately add the ground beef along with honey, and mix to incorporate. Bring the pot back up to an aggressive simmer, mixing constantly, for about 3 minutes or until beef is heated through. Add extra water or stock if the sauce is becoming too thick.
Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Use your best judgment in the heat adjustment.
Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).
Garnish each bowl with your preferred condiments or garnishes (chives, cheese, tortilla strips, and even fried shallots are some of my favorites).

alternatives.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

alternatives.name: Easy Beefy Flatbread Recipe
ingredients: ½ cup store-bought slaw mix or thinly sliced cabbage (use a mandolin)
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat toaster oven or larger oven to 350F. Slightly toast the flatbreads to help them keep their bodies and avoid becoming soggy while constructing them. Spray a sheet tray with oil and spread all four flatbreads on the tray, making sure they are not overlapping each other. Toast for 3 minutes, keeping an eye on the flatbreads. Remove from the oven carefully. Keep oven on.
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Spread 1 tablespoon of pesto on top of each flatbread.
Divide ¼ cup of arugula and ¼ cup of Trifecta mushrooms on top of each flatbread, sprinkling around.
Similarly, sprinkle 4 ounces of the crumbled beef on each flatbread. Finish by dividing the 1 ounce of crumbled gorgonzola cheese evenly into all 4 flatbreads (¼ ounce on each).
Return built flatbreads to the sheet tray used to toast the flatbreads, and bake in the oven for 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted. Cut into quarters and enjoy!

alternatives.name: Protein Pumpkin Pancakes With Oats Recipe
ingredients: Topping: 2 tsp peanut flour mixed with water until syrupy
alternatives.recipe:
Blend the eggs, protein powder, oats and pumpkin together until smooth
Cook like pancakes on a nonstick griddle over medium heat
Flip when bubbles form on surface
Mix peanut flour with water to make syrupy topping
Serve topped with peanut flour syrup

alternatives.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

alternatives.name: High Protein Breakfast Banana Split Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Evenly divide greek yogurt into 3 separate bowls
Mix chocolate protein powder with yogurt in one bowl
Mix strawberry protein powder with yogurt in second bowl
Mix vanilla protein powder with yogurt in third bowl
Place each bowl in freezer for 20 minutes
Slice banana in half lengthwise
Remove yogurt from freezer and give each bowl a good mix
Assemble each flavor of yogurt on top of the banana
Finish off with strawberries, pineapple, whipped topping, walnuts, chocolate sauce and cherry

alternatives.recipe:

Heat in microwave for 30-45 seconds and mix well
Cook pasta according to directions
Toss cooked pasta, bean sprouts, shredded chicken, and sauce together
Evenly divide between 2 plates
Top with roasted peanuts and fresh chives if desired

alternatives.name: High Protein Cheesy Steak Pizza Recipe
ingredients: 1 cup reduced fat shredded mozzarella cheese
alternatives.recipe:
Slice steak into thin strips and grill or saute until desired doneness
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place pizza crust on top
Top crust with pizza sauce, half the cheese, peppers, onions, and grilled steak
Finish with remaining cheese
Bake for about 15 minutes until golden and bubbly
Allow to cool slightly, slice and serve

alternatives.name: Grilled Sausage and Turkey Flatbread Pizza Recipe
ingredients: 0.25 cup assorted colored bell peppers, sliced
alternatives.recipe:
Heat grill to around 300 degrees
Place each flatbread top side down and grill until crispy
While bread is grilling, cook ground turkey breast in a skillet until cooked through
Once bread is crispy, flip over and top each flatbread with half the sauce, ground turkey, sausage, bell peppers and cheese
Close grill cover and continue to grill until cheese is melted
Enjoy right away!

Drain cauliflower and set aside

Add all ingredients into a blender
Mix for 30 seconds

ingredients: 2 Tbsp Maple Syrup or Raw Honey
alternatives.recipe:
In large bowl, combine oats, ground chia, hemp seeds, cacao powder, protein powder, cinnamon and sea salt

alternatives.name: Trifecta Five Minute Burger Recipe
ingredients: 4 hamburger buns, whole wheat or whole grain, toasted
2 tablespoons chipotle mayo or favorite condiment
½ cup arugula or any other bitter leafy green
½ cup Trifecta portobello mushroom, warmed
1 cup favorite Trifecta veggies, as a side
alternatives.recipe:
Begin by toasting buns in a toaster or toaster oven until golden brown.
Microwave Trifecta patties for 2 minutes to reheat, by making a small hole in a corner to allow steam to escape. Carefully remove plastic film and keep warm until needed. Spread the chipotle mayo on both burger buns. On the bottom bun, add a small ⅛ packed cup of arugula.
Slice tomatoes. Slice the avocados lengthwise and separate them into quarters. Fan avocado and place on top of the leafy greens. Carefully transfer the patties from the microwave to the bottom burger bun. Place 3 thin tomato slices or 2 thick slices on top of each patty. Top with ⅛ cup warm mushrooms and place the top bun on the burger.
Optional side: Reheat 1 cup of your favorite Trifecta vegetable and enjoy your 5-minute dinner!
